commands.review_summary:
The branch contains an already-main Azure/OpenAI transport commit plus a QQBot gateway change that replaces four raw log-preview slices with `truncateUtf16Safe` and adds surrogate-boundary tests; GitHub's current potential merge commit includes only the QQBot files.

PR surface: Source +38, Tests +216. Total +254 across 10 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main can put a high-surrogate half in the four QQBot log previews when an emoji straddles each `.slice(0, N)` boundary; I did not run tests in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor action is needed for real behavior proof; no automated code repair is indicated because the potential merge result has no concrete patch defect.

target.title: fix(qqbot): drop dangling surrogates in gateway log previews
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

`extensions/qqbot/src/engine/gateway/` ships four inbound-message log previews that slice raw UTF-16 with `String.prototype.slice(0, N)`:

- `gateway.ts:64` — `onMessageSent` debug log truncates `meta.ttsText` to 30 chars
- `message-queue.ts:248` — per-command debug log truncates `cmd.content` to 50 chars
- `inbound-attachments.ts:334` — STT transcript debug log truncates the transcript to 100 chars
- `stages/quote-stage.ts:92` — quote-detected debug log truncates `refBody` to 80 chars

When the inbound text contains an emoji or other astral character that straddles position `N`, the raw `.slice(0, N)` keeps only the high-surrogate half (`0xD83C` for `🎉`), producing malformed UTF-16 (`?`/`�`) in the agent-facing verbose log.

## Why This Change Was Made

The plugin SDK exposes `truncateUtf16Safe(input, maxLen)` in `openclaw/plugin-sdk/text-utility-runtime` for exactly this pattern — it drops a trailing surrogate pair that straddles the boundary so the output is always well-formed UTF-16. Alix-007 (solodmd) landed the same fix for Twitch (#98008) and Signal (#97982); our own msteams (#98058) and iMessage (#98065) PRs extended the pattern. This PR closes the remaining qqbot gateway surface.

## Evidence

Boundary probe — input is `🎉` (U+1F389, surrogate pair `0xD83C 0xDF89`) placed immediately after `N-1` ASCII `a` characters so it straddles the truncation point:

```
[gateway.ts onMessageSent ttsText (30)]
  BEFORE .slice(0, 30):  length=30  tail=[0061 0061 0061 d83c]   ← lone high surrogate, malformed UTF-16
  AFTER  truncateUtf16Safe: length=29  tail=[0061 0061 0061 0061]   ← clean, emoji dropped whole

[message-queue.ts command content (50)]
  BEFORE .slice(0, 50): length=50 tail=[0061 0061 0061 d83c]
  AFTER  truncateUtf16Safe: length=49 tail=[0061 0061 0061 0061]

[inbound-attachments.ts STT transcript (100)]
  BEFORE .slice(0, 100): length=100 tail=[0061 0061 0061 d83c]
  AFTER  truncateUtf16Safe: length=99  tail=[0061 0061 0061 0061]

[stages/quote-stage.ts refBody (80)]
  BEFORE .slice(0, 80): length=80 tail=[0061 0061 0061 d83c]
  AFTER  truncateUtf16Safe: length=79 tail=[0061 0061 0061 0061]
```

`🎉` = U+1F389, high surrogate `0xD83C`, low surrogate `0xDF89`. The lone `d83c` half in the BEFORE rows is the malformed UTF-16 the previous code emits; the AFTER rows show a clean ASCII tail with the surrogate pair dropped whole.

## After-fix Proof

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/qqbot/src/engine/gateway/message-queue.test.ts extensions/qqbot/src/engine/gateway/inbound-attachments.test.ts extensions/qqbot/src/engine/gateway/truncate-utf16.test.ts --run --reporter=verbose`

```
 ✓ |extension-messaging| extensions/qqbot/src/engine/gateway/inbound-attachments.test.ts > inbound-attachments STT transcript log preview UTF-16 truncation > drops a trailing surrogate straddling the 100-char boundary 1ms
 ✓ |extension-messaging| extensions/qqbot/src/engine/gateway/inbound-attachments.test.ts > inbound-attachments STT transcript log preview UTF-16 truncation > passes plain ASCII under the cap through unchanged 0ms
 ✓ |extension-messaging| extensions/qqbot/src/engine/gateway/inbound-attachments.test.ts > inbound-attachments STT transcript log preview UTF-16 truncation > stays empty for empty input 1ms
 ✓ |extension-messaging| extensions/qqbot/src/engine/gateway/inbound-attachments.test.ts > inbound-attachments STT transcript log preview UTF-16 truncation > preserves an emoji fully inside the 100-char window (no false-positive drop) 1ms
 ✓ |extension-messaging| extensions/qqbot/src/engine/gateway/message-queue.test.ts > message-queue command-content log preview UTF-16 truncation > drops a trailing surrogate straddling the 50-char boundary 0ms
 ✓ |extension-messaging| extensions/qqbot/src/engine/gateway/message-queue.test.ts > message-queue command-content log preview UTF-16 truncation > passes plain ASCII under the cap through unchanged 0ms
 ✓ |extension-messaging| extensions/qqbot/src/engine/gateway/message-queue.test.ts > message-queue command-content log preview UTF-16 truncation > stays empty for empty input 0ms
 ✓ |extension-messaging| extensions/qqbot/src/engine/gateway/message-queue.test.ts > message-queue command-content log preview UTF-16 truncation > preserves an emoji fully inside the 50-char window (no false-positive drop) 1ms
 ✓ |extension-messaging| extensions/qqbot/src/engine/gateway/truncate-utf16.test.ts > gateway onMessageSent ttsText log preview truncation (cap=30) > drops a trailing surrogate straddling the 30-char boundary 1ms
 ✓ |extension-messaging| extensions/qqbot/src/engine/gateway/truncate-utf16.test.ts > gateway onMessageSent ttsText log preview truncation (cap=30) > passes plain ASCII under the cap through unchanged 1ms
 ✓ |extension-messaging| extensions/qqbot/src/engine/gateway/truncate-utf16.test.ts > gateway onMessageSent ttsText log preview truncation (cap=30) > treats empty / undefined-equivalent input as empty 0ms
 ✓ |extension-messaging| extensions/qqbot/src/engine/gateway/truncate-utf16.test.ts > gateway onMessageSent ttsText log preview truncation (cap=30) > preserves an emoji fully inside the 30-char window (no false-positive drop) 0ms
 ✓ |extension-messaging| extensions/qqbot/src/engine/gateway/truncate-utf16.test.ts > quote-stage refBody log preview truncation (cap=80) > drops a trailing surrogate straddling the 80-char boundary 1ms
 ✓ |extension-messaging| extensions/qqbot/src/engine/gateway/truncate-utf16.test.ts > quote-stage refBody log preview truncation (cap=80) > passes plain ASCII under the cap through unchanged 1ms
 ✓ |extension-messaging| extensions/qqbot/src/engine/gateway/truncate-utf16.test.ts > quote-stage refBody log preview truncation (cap=80) > treats empty / undefined-equivalent input as empty 0ms
 ✓ |extension-messaging| extensions/qqbot/src/engine/gateway/truncate-utf16.test.ts > quote-stage refBody log preview truncation (cap=80) > preserves an emoji fully inside the 80-char window (no false-positive drop) 0ms
 ✓ ... (21 pre-existing tests, all green)

 Test Files  3 passed (3)
      Tests  37 passed (37)
   Duration  2.13s

[test] passed 1 Vitest shard in 13.13s
```

- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.scripts.json extensions/qqbot/src/engine/gateway/gateway.ts extensions/qqbot/src/engine/gateway/inbound-attachments.ts extensions/qqbot/src/engine/gateway/message-queue.ts extensions/qqbot/src/engine/gateway/stages/quote-stage.ts extensions/qqbot/src/engine/gateway/message-queue.test.ts extensions/qqbot/src/engine/gateway/inbound-attachments.test.ts extensions/qqbot/src/engine/gateway/truncate-utf16.test.ts` → EXIT=0
- `git diff --check openclaw/main...HEAD` → clean

## Diff scope

```
 extensions/qqbot/src/engine/gateway/gateway.ts                       |   3 +-
 extensions/qqbot/src/engine/gateway/inbound-attachments.ts           |   3 +-
 extensions/qqbot/src/engine/gateway/message-queue.ts                 |   3 +-
 extensions/qqbot/src/engine/gateway/stages/quote-stage.ts            |   3 +-
 extensions/qqbot/src/engine/gateway/message-queue.test.ts            |  32 +++++
 extensions/qqbot/src/engine/gateway/inbound-attachments.test.ts      |  32 +++++
 extensions/qqbot/src/engine/gateway/truncate-utf16.test.ts           |  68 ++++++++++++ (new)
 7 files changed, 140 insertions(+), 4 deletions(-)
```

The new `truncate-utf16.test.ts` consolidates helper-only tests for `gateway.ts` and `stages/quote-stage.ts` (neither source file has its own dedicated test); the other two source files append a `describe` block to their existing test file. No committed repro script (per SKILL.md rule); the hex-output boundary probe in the Evidence section was generated inline and is not part of the diff.

## Security & Privacy

No user-facing behavior change for ASCII input. The previews render identically for non-emoji text. For emoji-straddling input, the preview is one code unit shorter because the surrogate pair is dropped whole instead of leaving a lone high surrogate — this is the intended UTF-16 boundary fix, not content loss.

## Compatibility

Plugin SDK export (`openclaw/plugin-sdk/text-utility-runtime`) is already in `package.json` exports for `@openclaw/plugin-sdk` (re-exported from `src/plugin-sdk/text-utility-runtime.ts`). No new dependency added at the package level. The helpers are dependency-free per `src/shared/utf16-slice.ts:1-5` (no `node:` imports), so they bundle cleanly into both server and UI builds.

## What was not tested

Live QQBot message flow with a real surrogate-pair payload. The fix is a one-line surrogate-pair guard per call site; the helpers themselves are covered by unit tests in `src/shared/utf16-slice.ts`. Integration coverage at this layer is intentionally out of scope — Alix-007's PRs #98008 (Twitch) and #97982 (Signal) and our own #98058 (msteams) / #98065 (iMessage) followed the same boundary and were accepted on the same evidence.

## Related

- Alix-007 #98008 (Twitch): same fix shape — `truncateUtf16Safe` on a debug-log preview.
- Alix-007 #97982 (Signal): same fix shape — `truncateUtf16Safe` on a verbose-log preview.
- Our #98058 (msteams): same fix shape — message-handler preview UTF-16 truncation.
- Our #98065 (iMessage): same fix shape — debounced merge + probe snippet.
- Alix-007 #96575 (qqbot reminder job name): already merged — `truncateUtf16Safe` on a job-name preview. This PR covers the remaining gateway cluster.
- Helper source: `src/shared/utf16-slice.ts` (read-only reference, already merged).

## Diff stat
- Source: 12 net insertions (3 per src file × 4 files = 1 import + 1 line edit + 1 deletion each)
- Tests: 132 net insertions (32 + 32 + 68)
- Total: 140 insertions / 4 deletions across 7 files
- 12 new UTF-16 truncation tests added (4 per call site boundary probe)
